title.en: That's so cool! 너무 기대된다! 너무 멋지다!

description.en: When you have fun plans or hear great news! Practice expressing excitement and admiration with 너무 기대된다 and 너무 멋지다.
description.ko: 즐거운 계획이 있거나 멋진 소식을 들었을 때! 너무 기대된다와 너무 멋지다를 사용해 설레는 마음과 감탄을 표현해 봅니다.

tags: Reaction. Excitement. Admiration. Positive. Daily Life

content.speaker: John
content.text: What's up world! Welcome back. You are listening to... "Real Reaction!" I'm your host. John.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 존! 저 드디어 다음 달에 오랫동안 계획했던 유럽 여행을 가기로 했어요!
content.translation: John! I finally decided to go on that Europe trip I've been planning for a long time next month!

content.speaker: John
content.text: Oh, how exciting! 진짜 너무 기대되겠는데요!
content.translation: Oh, how exciting! I bet you're really looking forward to it!

content.speaker: John
content.text: Traveling across Europe... That's so cool! 정말 멋지다!
content.translation: Traveling across Europe... That's so cool! That's so wonderful!

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 고마워요. 사진 많이 찍어서 보여줄게요.
content.translation: Thank you. I'll take lots of pictures and show them to you.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 가고 싶었던 미술관이랑 명소들을 다 예약했더니 벌써부터 설레요.
content.translation: I've booked all the museums and landmarks I wanted to go to. so I'm already excited.

content.speaker: John
content.text: 너무 기대된다. This expression is filled with excitement. right.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 네. 앞으로 일어날 즐거운 일에 대해 설레는 마음을 표현할 때 써요.
content.translation: Yes. It's used to express excitement about something fun that will happen in the future.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 친구의 소식에 "정말 기대되겠다!"라고 공감해 줄 때도 아주 좋아요.
content.translation: It's also great for empathizing with a friend's news. saying "You must be really looking forward to it!"

content.speaker: John
content.text: 너무 기대된다.

content.speaker: John
content.text: Then what about 너무 멋지다.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 이 표현은 어떤 대상이나 상황이 훌륭하고 근사할 때 쓰는 감탄사예요.
content.translation: This expression is an exclamation used when a subject or situation is wonderful and nice.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 누군가의 도전이나 성공을 축하하며 "진짜 멋지다!" 라고 말하면 최고의 칭찬이 되죠.
content.translation: If you congratulate someone on their challenge or success by saying "That's so cool!". it becomes the best compliment.

content.speaker: John
content.text: 너무 멋지다.

content.speaker: John
content.text: Okay. let's try a situation. Imagine I just told you that I'm going to perform a magic show for children this weekend.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 존. 이번 주말에 어린이들을 위해서 마술 공연을 한다면서요?
content.translation: John. I heard you're performing a magic show for children this weekend?

content.speaker: John
content.text: Yes! I've been practicing a special trick where a rabbit comes out of a hat.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 와! 너무 멋지다! 존이 마술사라니 정말 상상도 못 했어요.
content.translation: Wow! That's so cool! I never imagined you being a magician. John.

content.speaker: John
content.text: I hope the kids like it. I'm a bit nervous but also very excited.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 아이들이 정말 좋아할 거예요. 저도 공연이 어떻게 끝날지 너무 기대돼요!
content.translation: The kids will love it. I'm also really looking forward to how the performance will turn out!

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 연습한 대로만 하면 분명히 성공할 거예요. 존. 파이팅!
content.translation: If you just do as you practiced. it will definitely be a success. John. Fighting!

content.speaker: John
content.text: Thanks for the support. Mina!

content.speaker: John
content.text: Sharing positive energy makes everyone feel good.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 맞아요. 주변에 좋은 일이 생겼을 때 진심으로 감탄하고 함께 기대해 주는 게 중요해요.
content.translation: Right. It's important to sincerely admire and look forward to good things when they happen around you.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 오늘 배운 표현들로 여러분의 긍정적인 마음을 듬뿍 전해 보세요!
content.translation: Convey your positive heart with the expressions we learned today!

content.speaker: John
content.text: Let's review our "exciting" reactions one last time.

content.speaker: John
content.text: 너무 기대된다! Oh, how exciting!

content.speaker: John
content.text: 너무 멋지다! That's so cool!

content.speaker: John
content.text: 정말 설렌다! I'm so thrilled!

content.speaker: John
content.text: 진짜 대단하다! That's truly amazing!

content.speaker: John
content.text: 벌써부터 기다려져! I'm already looking forward to it!

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 여러분도 오늘 가슴 설레는 즐거운 일들이 가득한 하루 되시길 바랄게요.
content.translation: I hope you all have a day full of heart-fluttering and joyful things today.

content.speaker: John
content.text: That's all for today. See you in the next episode.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 다음에 또 만나요. 안녕~!
content.translation: See you again next time. Bye~!

vocabulary.example: 이번 여행이 정말 기대돼요. (I'm really looking forward to this trip.)

vocabulary.meaning: To be excited. To be thrilled
vocabulary.example: 소풍 가기 전날이라 잠이 안 올 정도로 설레요. (I'm so excited that I can't sleep because it's the day before the picnic.)
유럽에는 아름다운 명소가 정말 많아요. (There are so many beautiful landmarks in Europe.)
존의 마술 실력에 모두가 감탄했어요. (Everyone admired John's magic skills.)
마법 같은 일이 일어나는 상상을 해보세요. (Imagine magical things happening.)
항상 긍정적으로 생각하면 좋은 일이 생길 거예요. (If you always think positively. good things will happen.)
